name: Mound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the devil's food cake mix according to the package instructions in a 13x9 inch pan.
2. In a saucepan, melt the milk and sugar over low heat. Add marshmallows and coconut flakes. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
3. When the cake is finished baking, use the handle of a wooden spoon to poke 15 holes in the top of the cake.
4. Pour the marshmallow mixture onto the cake and spread evenly with the wooden spoon.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely.
6. In a saucepan, combine sugar, butter, and milk. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then continue boiling for an additional minute. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate chips until melted.
7. Pour the icing over the cooled cake and spread evenly with a spatula.
